rationale: The cited paper develops hierarchical Bayesian response modeling for nonrandom marketing-mix allocation, and the citing paper’s core contribution includes inferring customer-level marketing action sensitivity in a Bayesian CRM model. This strong overlap in constructs/methodological concerns (marketing response heterogeneity and allocation/endogeneity issues) makes it plausibly substantive rather than an obvious incidental mention, despite the raw evidence only showing a DOI match without local context.
